caption: An older man with glasses and gray hair speaks from a wooden podium in a room with brown slatted wall paneling. He wears a blue button-down shirt with a bird pattern and a colorful woven sash around his waist. In the initial close-up views, he gestures with his right hand and speaks into a microphone. The on-screen text "ORCA" appears in a white box to the right of the speaker. As the scene shifts to a wider shot, the man continues to speak at the podium, which features a logo that includes the word "LIBRARY." The wider perspective reveals an audience of people seated in front of him, seen from the back. A black speaker cabinet is visible on the left side of the room, and the "ORCA" label remains on the screen.
